title: Brook Steals the Road Poneglyph Copy
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Judge, Sanji, Pudding as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Whole cake chateau Queen's Chambers

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oww- wife!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What's the matter, pronetheus?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is deeper than I expected! It just opened up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mamama... How pathetic! Or, rather, I should congratulate this guy on a job well done!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the first time you three have ever been injured, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: MAMA... Are you just going to hang onto that bag of bones?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Bag of Bones"? That's not very nice, pudding...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There isn't another creature like this in all the world! He's soul art.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For the time being, instead of throwing him in the museum, I'm gonna hold onto and walk around with him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: No!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, good work. Those straw hats...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never expected them to make it out of the seducing woods, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We managed to round them up and throw them in one of the books in the prisoner's library.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes O I just saw them. How pathetic.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you gonna just kill 'em off like that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes. After the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WAHA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WAHA- AAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The German should be drowning in their drink right about now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I sent the Barnaids over to them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I see... but Reju came snooping!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's got good intuition, that woman! I dealt with her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What?! Don't tell me you killed her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the world is this conversation?! Pudding? The ever-so-sweet, innocent pudding?! Why is...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come on, Mama! You really don't trust me, do you?! just her leg!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I shot her once and then erased her memory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Be careful, okay? You're the precious bride.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If one of these fights goes south and you get taken out, we're going to have a real problem.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Thanks for the consideration. By the way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks to our little fight, I got to test out the gun.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no mistaking it. Doesn't matter if they're one of the Germa's modified humans...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This thing'll make Swiss cheese out of 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: HAAAAHAHA! You're a sharp girl!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tomorrow, your shot is going to be the signal.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone's going to be focusing on you two for the big kiss.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji, with a stupid grin on his face, is going to lift your veil to kiss you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And then! He'll see for the first time your third eye! He'll falter for a second.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's your opening! End him with a single shot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Right between the eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Send his brains flying! The whole hall will be at a loss for words! frozen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And though they'll sense the danger, it'll be too late!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those bare-handed Vinsmokes will already have countless guns at their backs!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And as soon as they cry out in terror, their blood will run!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gunshots will ringout endlessly like fireworks! A rain of bullets will drive through their long-dead corpses!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pools of Blood Will Spread onto the Floor! The almost Unrecognizable bodies of the 6 Vinsmokes Sprawled out! As the Gunshots become our 21-gun salute!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's when the real party begins!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Celebrate! With cake! With black tea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: With their useless commanders dead,

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: The German will be mine!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 52 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
